channel.title: Projects on Tirtho Roy
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Tirtho Roy

item.title: Chatbot Frontend Development & UI Enhancement
item.description: Developed a versatile chatbot frontend to improve user experience and interface design for agricultural and biosystems engineering applications.

item.title: Medical AI Safety & Ethical Alignment
item.description: Developing multi-agent frameworks to ensure medical AI systems are safe, ethical, and compliant with healthcare standards and regulations.

item.title: Vision-Language Models for Agriculture
item.description: Leveraging vision-language models and computer vision to address specialized challenges in agricultural applications, including crop monitoring, disease detection, and yield prediction.

item.title: LLMs in Finance: Enhancing Decision-Making Processes
item.description: Leveraging Large Language Models to improve financial decision-making, with applications to startup evaluation and investor behavior analysis.
